name: IBGE Brasil MCP
description: MCP server for live, sourced Brazilian public data from the official IBGE APIs - geography, census, economy, names, health (via SIDRA) and maps.
author: Sidney Bissoli

tools.name: ibge_estados
tools.description: List all 27 Brazilian states (UFs); filter by region, sort by id/name/abbreviation.

tools.name: ibge_municipios
tools.description: List Brazilian municipalities (5,570) by state or name; returns the 7-digit IBGE code.

tools.name: ibge_localidade
tools.description: Return the full record and hierarchy of one locality (state/municipality/district) by IBGE code.

tools.name: ibge_populacao
tools.description: Real-time Brazilian national population projection (estimate, birth/death rates, daily increment).

tools.name: ibge_sidra
tools.description: Query any SIDRA table (Census, PNAD, GDP, etc.) by table code, territorial level and period.

tools.name: ibge_nomes
tools.description: Name frequency and rankings in Brazil by decade, sex and locality (IBGE Nomes/Censo).

tools.name: ibge_noticias
tools.description: Search and list published IBGE news articles and survey releases.

tools.name: ibge_sidra_tabelas
tools.description: List and search available SIDRA tables (aggregates) by name or survey.

tools.name: ibge_sidra_metadados
tools.description: Return the structure/metadata of a SIDRA table (variables, levels, classifications, periods).

tools.name: ibge_malhas
tools.description: Get administrative geographic meshes (Brazil/region/state/municipality) as GeoJSON, TopoJSON or SVG.

tools.name: ibge_pesquisas
tools.description: List IBGE surveys (Census, PNAD, GDP, etc.) and their tables.

tools.name: ibge_censo
tools.description: Query Demographic Census data (1970-2022) by theme without needing SIDRA table codes.

tools.name: ibge_indicadores
tools.description: Query IBGE economic and social indicator time series (GDP, IPCA, unemployment, etc.).

tools.name: ibge_cnae
tools.description: Query the CNAE classification of economic activities by code or description.

tools.name: ibge_geocodigo
tools.description: Decode an IBGE code's structure or resolve a locality name to its code at any level.

tools.name: ibge_calendario
tools.description: Query the IBGE release and field-collection calendar (upcoming survey publications).

tools.name: ibge_comparar
tools.description: Compare/rank up to 10 localities on one indicator with statistics.

tools.name: ibge_malhas_tema
tools.description: Get thematic geographic meshes (biomes, Legal Amazon, semi-arid, metropolitan regions, etc.).

tools.name: ibge_vizinhos
tools.description: Find neighboring municipalities (same-mesoregion proximity), optionally with population data.

tools.name: ibge_datasaude
tools.description: Query Brazilian health indicators via IBGE SIDRA (mortality, births, life expectancy, sanitation, coverage).

tools.name: ibge_paises
tools.description: Query international country data via IBGE (area, languages, currency, region).

tools.name: ibge_cidades
tools.description: Single-municipality panel (Cidades@): population, HDI, GDP and other indicators, with history.

resources.name: ufs
resources.description: The 27 federation units with IBGE code (2 digits), abbreviation, name and region.

resources.name: regioes
resources.description: The 5 macro-regions with code, abbreviation, name and member UFs.

resources.name: niveis-territoriais
resources.description: Territorial-level codes accepted by the SIDRA tools, with label and name.

resources.name: tabelas-sidra
resources.description: Codes of the most-used SIDRA tables (population, GDP, IPCA, etc.) with description.

resources.name: biomas
resources.description: Codes of the 6 Brazilian biomes (used by ibge_malhas_tema).

prompts.name: comparar-municipios
prompts.description: Compare 2 to 10 localities (municipalities or states) on an indicator and produce a commented ranking.

prompts.name: perfil-demografico
prompts.description: Build a demographic profile of a locality combining population, census and socioeconomic indicators.
